mdSummary:
# Rating

Star rating input with half-star support.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Forms/Specialized
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/rating

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Rating | FormField | `FormField.FormFieldContext?` | `` |  |
| Rating | Value | `double` | `` |  |
| Rating | ValueChanged | `EventCallback<double>` | `` |  |
| Rating | Max | `int` | `5` |  |
| Rating | AllowHalf | `bool` | `` |  |
| Rating | ReadOnly | `bool` | `` |  |
| Rating | IconContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` | Icon slot. Named IconContent to avoid shadowing the <Icon> component. |
| Rating | Size | `Lumeo.Size` | `Lumeo.Size.Md` |  |
| Rating | Required | `bool` | `` |  |
| Rating | Invalid | `bool` | `` |  |
| Rating | ErrorText | `string?` | `` |  |
| Rating | HelperText | `string?` | `` |  |
| Rating | Label | `string?` | `` |  |
| Rating | Name | `string?` | `` |  |
| Rating | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| Rating | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |

## Slots
- `IconContent` (Rating) — Icon slot. Named IconContent to avoid shadowing the <Icon> component.

## Events
- `ValueChanged` (`EventCallback<double>`)

## Sub-components
- (none)

## Cascading values it expects
- `FormField` (`FormField.FormFieldContext?`)

## Services it injects
- `ILumeoLocalizer` (Lumeo.Services.Localization)
- `IComponentInteropService` ()

## Keyboard
—

## Example
```razor
<Rating />
```

## CSS variables
`--color-destructive`, `--color-foreground`, `--color-muted`, `--color-muted-foreground`, `--color-ring`, `--radius`

## Files
- `UI/Rating/Rating.razor`
